def negative_manual_dict_increment_instead_of_counter_or_defaultdict():
    rule_id = "manual_dict_increment_instead_of_counter_or_defaultdict"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Frequency counter maintained with manual if-key-in-dict increment; use collections.Counter."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
